Who We Are

A Generation Rising
for God

Kasarani Youngsters Church is a Spirit-filled community of young people located in the Kasarani Sunton area of Nairobi, Kenya — opposite Murema Primary School. We are proudly part of the Gospel Revival Wave Church family, on mission to see a generation transformed by the power of the Gospel.

We believe in authentic worship, powerful prayer, deep Bible study, and vibrant fellowship. Whether you’re searching for faith or hungry to go deeper — there is a place for you here.

🔥

Spirit-Filled Worship

Encounter God in our powerful praise and worship

📖

Word-Grounded

Biblical teaching equipping youth for everyday life

🤝

Community

A family where every young person belongs

🌍

Mission

Taking the Gospel beyond our walls to the world

Our Roots

About Gospel Revival Wave Church

✛
“Where Everybody is Valuable”

The Vision — Gospel Revival Wave Church

🌍

Who We Are

GRWC is a Spirit-filled church in Kasarani, Nairobi. Built on God's Word, we raise a generation that impacts the world for Jesus.

🙌

Our Mission

Preaching the Gospel to every soul regardless of background, through worship, prayer, discipleship and community outreach.

🔥

The Revival Wave

Known for revival atmosphere — powerful worship, anointed preaching, signs and wonders. Revival is not a moment. It is a lifestyle.

👥

Youth at the Centre

Through KYC we run youth services, retreats and outreaches. Young people are not the church of tomorrow — they are the church of today.

“They went out and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them and confirming the word through signs.”
Mark 16:20

Grow With Us

Our Departments

🎵

In KYC we not only praise the Lord by singing but also raise talents. 🎤✨

There are a lot of departments in which one can grow spiritually, mentally, and also talent-wise. 🙏🧠🌟

🎙️

Service Coordination

The backbone of every Sunday service — keeping everything running smoothly for God's glory. 🏆

🤝

Ushering

The first face of KYC — welcoming every soul who walks through our doors with warmth and love. ❤️

🎸

Instrumentalists

Guitar, bass, keys, drums — if you can play it, there's a place for your gift on our platform. 🎹🥁

🎭

Creative Department

Where art meets the Spirit — expressing God through creativity 🎨

📜
Poetry Ministry
Speaking life through powerful, anointed words. ✍️
🎬
Acting Ministry
Bringing the Word of God to life on stage. 🌟
💃
Dance Ministry
Worshipping God through movement and rhythm. 🕺🔥
🎤
SIT Ministry
Spirit-inspired talent poured out for God's Kingdom. ✨
🌸

Decorative Department

Creating beautiful, Spirit-inspired environments that reflect God's glory every Sunday. 🕊️✨

🙏

Prayers

Interceding for our community, city and nation — the engine room of everything we do. 🔥⚡

📖

Bible Study

Going deep into the Word every Sunday morning — growing minds and hearts rooted in truth. 📚💡

🌠

And Many More...

There are always more opportunities opening up as KYC grows. Your gift has a home here. 🚀💫

🎉

Feel Free to Join Any Department!

All departments are open and also completely free — no payment required. 🆓✅
Come as you are, bring your gift, and let God use you for His glory. 🙌🌍

💬 Join a Department via WhatsApp

❓ FAQs
Where is KYC?+
Kasarani Sunton, opposite Murema Primary School, Nairobi. Sunday 9AM!
How do I give/tithe?+
M-Pesa Paybill 400222, Account 162929#KYC.
How do I join a department?+
All departments are open and free! Speak to a leader after service.
Can I get prayer from leaders?+
Yes! Tr Billy (0722143782), Tr Naomi (0701013207), Min. Joseph (0720968039), Tr Tina (0798919998).
